subcodes.first_line: O thou who supplicatest and criest out in the Abhá Kingdom, the sighs and lamentations, the very heart and soul, of that lover of the Beloved's countenance reach mine ears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبتهل و متضرع بملکوت ابهی آه و فغان و ناله دل و جان آن عاشق روی جانان بگوش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
